cluster.title: MCP & Connectors end-to-end
cluster.summary: Traces an MCP server from catalog/install through OAuth (discovery + dynamic client registration or pre-registered clients), TokenVault storage, the /internal/v1 cards/client-session/RPC proxy consumed by ai-backend, runtime tool exposure (load/call/auth/suggest builtins) and per-chat connector scoping, out to the web, chat-surface, and desktop connector UIs. Core MCP spine is solid with tokens confined to services/backend; the parallel Connectors-destination read model is stub-wired (fake OAuth URL, 503 callback, in-memory-only store, no production populate path) and the connector concept has ~10 hand-maintained representations across three catalogs.

nodes.summary: MCP & Connectors end-to-end: catalog -> install -> OAuth/PKCE -> TokenVault -> internal cards/RPC proxy -> runtime MCP tools -> per-chat scopes -> web/desktop connector UIs.

edges.label: /v1/mcp/* catalog, install, servers, auth start/skip, oauth callback
/v1/connectors/* destination read model + stub start-oauth + SSE stream
PATCH /v1/agent/conversations/{id}/connectors per-chat scope merge-patch
proxy /v1/mcp/* to backend :8100 (McpRegistryService)
proxy /v1/connectors/* incl. desktop catalog + desktop OAuth routes
PATCH /v1/agent/conversations/{id}/connectors forwarded to runtime API
GET /internal/v1/me/suggestible-connectors at run-create (service-token lane)
composes BackendMcpProvider + DynamicMcpRegistry + discovery cache
factory wires load_mcp_server / call_mcp_tool / auth_mcp / suggest_mcp_connector builtins
/internal/v1/mcp cards + auth/start + client-session + rpc (JSON-RPC proxy)
OAuth discovery (RFC 9728/8414), dynamic registration (RFC 7591), token exchange, JSON-RPC forward with Bearer
PostgresMcpStore when DATABASE_URL set; production fails closed without it
copilot_service_contracts headers for trusted service lane
ConnectorsDestination typed on api-types Connector/ConnectorCatalogEntry
ConnectorsRoute mounts chat-surface ConnectorsDestination/ConnectModal; composer button re-export shim
GET /v1/connectors/desktop/catalog + desktop start-oauth/oauth-callback (loopback/deep-link PKCE)
opens provider authorization_url in the system browser (openExternal)
DesktopMcpOAuthCoordinator drives McpRegistryService.start_auth/complete_auth + TokenVault
mcp_auth_required envelope (Connect/Skip card) on the run event stream
OAuth provider browser redirect terminates at public GET /v1/mcp/oauth/callback (state-anchored)
